experiment: BH2 — library continuous jump model (jumpmodels pkg) vs the frozen HMM belief
lineage: re-test of E-24b/KT4 (our Nystrup-style variant KILLED at flips −23.5%, bar −30%)

preregistration.kill_bar: flip_cut>=0.30 AND z_dsd>=hmm−0.5 AND ni_z>=hmm−0.5 (unchanged from KT4)
preregistration.penalty_rule: TRAIN-only: first grid penalty with train flips <= 0.7x HMM

verdict: KILLED on the same bar as KT4 — the library continuous JM does not rescue the jump-belief hypothesis on this substrate (BH2 closed honestly)
